heading: Making tax
label: 5821 Making tax
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5821, acts , ; , , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 724Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 203(d)72 Stat. 1427Pub. L. 90–618Sept. 2, 1958

Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There shall be levied, collected, and paid upon the making of a firearm a tax at the rate of $200 for each firearm made.”Pub. L. 119–211976—Subsec. (c). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There shall be levied, collected, and paid upon the making of a firearm a tax at the rate of $200 for each firearm made.”Pub. L. 119–211976—Subsec. (c). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.text: $200 for each firearm made in the case of a machinegun or a destructive device, and
$0 for any firearm made which is not described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: By whom paid
children.label: b By whom paid
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a) of this section shall be paid by the person making the firearm.

children.heading: Payment
children.label: c Payment
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a) of this section shall be payable by the stamp prescribed for payment by the Secretary.
